## ScreenShotPP v0.3.0

A feature release adding delayed (timer) capture.

### New

- **Delayed capture (timer).** Press a dedicated, configurable global shortcut
  (default `⌘⇧3` on macOS, `Ctrl⇧3` on Windows) to start a countdown that follows
  your cursor; when it reaches zero the screen is captured and the editing overlay
  opens. The countdown window is click-through, so you can open a menu or hover a
  tooltip while it counts down — ideal for capturing transient UI.
  - Configurable delay (default 3 seconds).
  - Configurable cancel shortcut (default `Escape`) to abort an active countdown.
  - All three are set from the Settings window.

### Internal

- Extracted the pure logic (geometry, countdown, settings) into a new
  `screenshotpp-core` crate so it can be unit-tested without the full GUI
  toolchain, and split CI into a fast pure-logic job and the full platform builds.
